image_review_limitation: Self-hosted image keys were present in generated outputs, but matching local image files were not found in the active checkout or C:/grookai_vault during this review.

correctly_left_pending.name: Magnetic Storm

likely_false_positives.name: Misty's Vitality

status_level_false_negatives.name: Dark Metal Energy

status_level_false_negatives.name: 古びたたての化石
status_level_false_negatives.issue: Interpretive/purpose language remained unflagged: 'sense of discovery and ancient history' and fossil 'significance'.

flag_level_false_negatives_inside_needs_.name: Rainbow Energy
flag_level_false_negatives_inside_needs_.issue: Card surface field overclaims standard surface, lack of texturing/gloss effects, edge wear, and print quality without a surface-policy flag; row was needs_review for other reasons.

failure_summary: Operational boundaries passed, but freeze-quality criteria failed due one likely status-level false positive, two status-level false negatives, and unflagged physical-surface claims inside needs_review rows.
